title: Eldoria Enhanced
description: This modpack includes several mechanics and features that will help improve your experience within Eldoria RP.
body:
![Logo Eldoria](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1858220382a22126c5993e9a33f344fa32d5f8f_0.webp)

**MODPACK DEDICATED TO THE MINECRAFT ELDORIA ROLEPLAY SERVER**

---
This modpack includes several mechanics and features that will help improve your experience within Eldoria RP. This modpack was created with the intention of serving the EldoriaRP Minecraft Server, a server for Portuguese speakers, with a focus on politics, economics, adventure, immersion and medieval realism, highly inspired by the Song of Ice and Fire and other works of fantasy literature.

**This modpack contains**: (You can find them in CurseForge)

Mods for optimization:
- Immediately Fast
- Sodium
- Others

Mods for enhanced visuals:
- Distant Horizons
- Falling Leaves
- Bobby
- Presence Footsteps
- YDM Weapon Master
- Others

Texture-packs for enhanced visuals:
- Excalibur
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Others

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader)

![Imagem Bonita](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69620cbc5fd71e6ab1e0ffb0a797322bae948d3.png)

[Eldoria Website](https://eldoria.com.br/)
